slices.name: _is_suspicious
slices.code:
16 | def _is_suspicious(path: str, suspicious_dirs: List[str]) -> bool:
  17 |     norm = path.replace("\\", "/").lower()
  18 |     return any(
  19 |         f"/{d.lower()}/" in norm or norm.endswith(f"/{d.lower()}")
  20 |         for d in suspicious_dirs
  21 |     )

slices.name: _is_bundle_artifact
slices.code:
24 | def _is_bundle_artifact(rel_path: str) -> bool:
  25 |     lower = rel_path.lower()
  26 |     return any(pat in lower for pat in _BUNDLE_ARTIFACT_SUBSTRINGS)

slices.name: _parse_csv_list
slices.code:
29 | def _parse_csv_list(value: str) -> List[str]:
  30 |     return [item.strip() for item in value.split(",") if item.strip()]

slices.name: run_checks
slices.code:
33 | def run_checks(
  34 |     rows: List[Dict[str, str]],
  35 |     suspicious_dirs: List[str],
  36 |     required_paths: List[str],
  37 |     required_exts: List[str],
  38 |     max_rows_soft: int,
  39 |     max_rows_hard: int,
  40 |     max_file_size: int,
  41 | ) -> Dict[str, Any]:
  42 |     missing_files: List[str] = []
  43 |     suspicious_paths: List[str] = []
  44 |     bundle_artifacts: List[str] = []
  45 |     oversize_files: List[str] = []
  46 | 
  47 |     present_exts: set = set()
  48 |     present_rel_paths_lower: List[str] = []
  49 | 
  50 |     for row in rows:
  51 |         abs_path = row.get("abs_path", "").strip()
  52 |         rel_path = row.get("rel_path", "").strip()
  53 |         ext = row.get("ext", "").strip().lower()
  54 | 
  55 |         if rel_path:
  56 |             present_rel_paths_lower.append(rel_path.lower())
  57 |         if ext:
  58 |             present_exts.add(ext)
  59 | 
  60 |         if abs_path:
  61 |             if not Path(abs_path).exists():
  62 |                 missing_files.append(abs_path)
  63 |             if _is_suspicious(abs_path, suspicious_dirs):
  64 |                 suspicious_paths.append(abs_path)
  65 | 
  66 |         if rel_path and _is_bundle_artifact(rel_path):
  67 |             bundle_artifacts.append(rel_path)
  68 | 
  69 |         if max_file_size > 0:
  70 |             try:
  71 |                 if int(row.get("size", 0)) > max_file_size:
  72 |                     oversize_files.append(rel_path or abs_path)
  73 |             except (ValueError, TypeError):
  74 |                 pass
  75 | 
  76 |     missing_required_paths: List[str] = []
  77 |     for rp in required_paths:
  78 |         rp_lower = rp.lower()
  79 |         if not any(rp_lower in p for p in present_rel_paths_lower):
  80 |             missing_required_paths.append(rp)
  81 | 
  82 |     missing_required_exts: List[str] = []
  83 |     for ext in required_exts:
  84 |         normalized = ext.lower() if ext.startswith(".") else f".{ext.lower()}"
  85 |         if normalized not in present_exts:
  86 |             missing_required_exts.append(normalized)
  87 | 
  88 |     row_count = len(rows)
  89 |     return {
  90 |         "row_count": row_count,
  91 |         "missing_files": missing_files,
  92 |         "suspicious_paths": suspicious_paths,
  93 |         "bundle_artifacts": bundle_artifacts,
  94 |         "oversize_files": oversize_files,
  95 |         "missing_required_paths": missing_required_paths,
  96 |         "missing_required_exts": missing_required_exts,
  97 |         "rows_exceeded_soft": max_rows_soft > 0 and row_count > max_rows_soft,
  98 |         "rows_exceeded_hard": max_rows_hard > 0 and row_count > max_rows_hard,
  99 |         "max_rows_soft": max_rows_soft,
 100 |         "max_rows_hard": max_rows_hard,
 101 |         "max_file_size": max_file_size,
 102 |     }

slices.name: determine_status
slices.code:
105 | def determine_status(findings: Dict[str, Any]) -> str:
 106 |     if (
 107 |         findings["missing_files"]
 108 |         or findings["missing_required_paths"]
 109 |         or findings["missing_required_exts"]
 110 |         or findings["rows_exceeded_hard"]
 111 |     ):
 112 |         return "BLOCK"
 113 |     if (
 114 |         findings["suspicious_paths"]
 115 |         or findings["bundle_artifacts"]
 116 |         or findings["oversize_files"]
 117 |         or findings["rows_exceeded_soft"]
 118 |     ):
 119 |         return "WARN"
 120 |     return "PASS"

slices.name: build_report
slices.code:
123 | def build_report(
 124 |     findings: Dict[str, Any],
 125 |     manifest_path: Path,
 126 |     status: str,
 127 |     suspicious_dirs: List[str],
 128 | ) -> Dict[str, Any]:
 129 |     # Identify which suspicious dir names were actually encountered.
 130 |     flagged_dir_names: set = set()
 131 |     for p in findings["suspicious_paths"]:
 132 |         norm = p.replace("\\", "/").lower()
 133 |         for d in suspicious_dirs:
 134 |             if f"/{d.lower()}/" in norm or norm.endswith(f"/{d.lower()}"):
 135 |                 flagged_dir_names.add(d)
 136 | 
 137 |     if status == "BLOCK":
 138 |         recommended_action = "Fix blocking issues before using this manifest with downstream tools."
 139 |     elif status == "WARN":
 140 |         recommended_action = "Review warnings. Consider adding flagged directories to the exclude list."
 141 |     else:
 142 |         recommended_action = "Manifest is healthy. Proceed with downstream tooling."
 143 | 
 144 |     return {
 145 |         "status": status,
 146 |         "manifest_path": str(manifest_path.resolve()),
 147 |         "summary": {
 148 |             "row_count": findings["row_count"],
 149 |             "missing_files": len(findings["missing_files"]),
 150 |             "suspicious_paths": len(findings["suspicious_paths"]),
 151 |             "bundle_artifacts": len(findings["bundle_artifacts"]),
 152 |             "oversize_files": len(findings["oversize_files"]),
 153 |             "missing_required_paths": len(findings["missing_required_paths"]),
 154 |             "missing_required_exts": len(findings["missing_required_exts"]),
 155 |             "rows_exceeded_soft": findings["rows_exceeded_soft"],
 156 |             "rows_exceeded_hard": findings["rows_exceeded_hard"],
 157 |         },
 158 |         "findings": {
 159 |             "missing_files": findings["missing_files"],
 160 |             "suspicious_paths": findings["suspicious_paths"],
 161 |             "bundle_artifacts": findings["bundle_artifacts"],
 162 |             "oversize_files": findings["oversize_files"],
 163 |             "missing_required_paths": findings["missing_required_paths"],
 164 |             "missing_required_exts": findings["missing_required_exts"],
 165 |         },
 166 |         "thresholds": {
 167 |             "max_rows_soft": findings["max_rows_soft"],
 168 |             "max_rows_hard": findings["max_rows_hard"],
 169 |             "max_file_size": findings["max_file_size"],
 170 |         },
 171 |         "recommended_action": recommended_action,
 172 |         "recommended_exclude_additions": sorted(flagged_dir_names),
 173 |     }

slices.name: _block_report_for_schema_error
slices.code:
176 | def _block_report_for_schema_error(
 177 |     manifest_path: Path,
 178 |     error_message: str,
 179 |     max_rows_soft: int,
 180 |     max_rows_hard: int,
 181 |     max_file_size: int,
 182 | ) -> Dict[str, Any]:
 183 |     empty_findings: Dict[str, Any] = {
 184 |         "missing_files": [],
 185 |         "suspicious_paths": [],
 186 |         "bundle_artifacts": [],
 187 |         "oversize_files": [],
 188 |         "missing_required_paths": [],
 189 |         "missing_required_exts": [],
 190 |     }
 191 |     return {
 192 |         "status": "BLOCK",
 193 |         "manifest_path": str(manifest_path.resolve()),
 194 |         "error": error_message,
 195 |         "summary": {
 196 |             "row_count": 0,
 197 |             "missing_files": 0,
 198 |             "suspicious_paths": 0,
 199 |             "bundle_artifacts": 0,
 200 |             "oversize_files": 0,
 201 |             "missing_required_paths": 0,
 202 |             "missing_required_exts": 0,
 203 |             "rows_exceeded_soft": False,
 204 |             "rows_exceeded_hard": False,
 205 |         },
 206 |         "findings": empty_findings,
 207 |         "thresholds": {
 208 |             "max_rows_soft": max_rows_soft,
 209 |             "max_rows_hard": max_rows_hard,
 210 |             "max_file_size": max_file_size,
 211 |         },
 212 |         "recommended_action": "Fix manifest column schema before using this manifest.",
 213 |         "recommended_exclude_additions": [],
 214 |     }

slices.name: build_markdown_sections
slices.code:
217 | def build_markdown_sections(report: Dict[str, Any]) -> Dict[str, Any]:
 218 |     summary = report["summary"]
 219 |     findings = report["findings"]
 220 | 
 221 |     sections: Dict[str, Any] = {
 222 |         "Summary": {
 223 |             "status": report["status"],
 224 |             "row_count": summary["row_count"],
 225 |             "missing_files": summary["missing_files"],
 226 |             "suspicious_paths": summary["suspicious_paths"],
 227 |             "bundle_artifacts": summary["bundle_artifacts"],
 228 |             "oversize_files": summary["oversize_files"],
 229 |             "missing_required_paths": summary["missing_required_paths"],
 230 |             "missing_required_exts": summary["missing_required_exts"],
 231 |         }
 232 |     }
 233 | 
 234 |     if findings["missing_files"]:
 235 |         sections["Missing Files"] = findings["missing_files"]
 236 |     if findings["suspicious_paths"]:
 237 |         sections["Suspicious Paths"] = findings["suspicious_paths"]
 238 |     if findings["bundle_artifacts"]:
 239 |         sections["Bundle Artifacts"] = findings["bundle_artifacts"]
 240 |     if findings["oversize_files"]:
 241 |         sections["Oversize Files"] = findings["oversize_files"]
 242 |     if findings["missing_required_paths"]:
 243 |         sections["Missing Required Paths"] = findings["missing_required_paths"]
 244 |     if findings["missing_required_exts"]:
 245 |         sections["Missing Required Extensions"] = findings["missing_required_exts"]
 246 |     if report.get("recommended_exclude_additions"):
 247 |         sections["Recommended Exclude Additions"] = report["recommended_exclude_additions"]
 248 | 
 249 |     sections["Recommendation"] = report["recommended_action"]
 250 |     return sections

slices.name: parse_args
slices.code:
253 | def parse_args() -> argparse.Namespace:
 254 |     parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description="Validate a create_file_map_v3 manifest CSV.")
 255 |     parser.add_argument("--manifest", required=True, help="Path to manifest CSV.")
 256 |     parser.add_argument("--config", help="Optional JSON config file supplying default thresholds.")
 257 |     parser.add_argument(
 258 |         "--required-path", action="append", default=[], dest="required_paths",
 259 |         metavar="PATH",
 260 |         help="Require a row whose rel_path contains PATH. Repeatable.",
 261 |     )
 262 |     parser.add_argument(
 263 |         "--required-ext", action="append", default=[], dest="required_exts",
 264 |         metavar="EXT",
 265 |         help="Require at least one row with this extension (e.g. .py). Repeatable.",
 266 |     )
 267 |     parser.add_argument(
 268 |         "--max-rows-soft", type=int, default=0,
 269 |         help="Row count above which status becomes WARN. 0 = no limit.",
 270 |     )
 271 |     parser.add_argument(
 272 |         "--max-rows-hard", type=int, default=0,
 273 |         help="Row count above which status becomes BLOCK. 0 = no limit.",
 274 |     )
 275 |     parser.add_argument(
 276 |         "--max-file-size", type=int, default=0,
 277 |         help="Files larger than this (bytes) are flagged as oversize. 0 = no limit.",
 278 |     )
 279 |     parser.add_argument("--out", default="manifest_doctor_report.json", help="JSON report output path.")
 280 |     parser.add_argument("--markdown-out", help="Optional Markdown report output path.")
 281 |     return parser.parse_args()

slices.name: main
slices.code:
284 | def main() -> int:
 285 |     args = parse_args()
 286 |     manifest_path = Path(args.manifest)
 287 | 
 288 |     if not manifest_path.exists():
 289 |         print(f"Error: Manifest not found: {manifest_path}", file=sys.stderr)
 290 |         return 1
 291 | 
 292 |     # Load optional config; CLI args take precedence over config values.
 293 |     cfg: Dict = {}
 294 |     if args.config:
 295 |         try:
 296 |             cfg = load_json_config(Path(args.config))
 297 |         except (FileNotFoundError, ConfigError) as exc:
 298 |             print(f"Error loading config: {exc}", file=sys.stderr)
 299 |             return 1
 300 | 
 301 |     suspicious_dirs = list(DEFAULT_SUSPICIOUS_DIRECTORIES) + _parse_csv_list(
 302 |         cfg.get("suspicious_dirs", "")
 303 |     )
 304 |     required_paths: list = args.required_paths or cfg.get("required_paths", [])
 305 |     required_exts: list = args.required_exts or cfg.get("required_exts", [])
 306 |     max_rows_soft: int = args.max_rows_soft or cfg.get("max_rows_soft", 0)
 307 |     max_rows_hard: int = args.max_rows_hard or cfg.get("max_rows_hard", 0)
 308 |     max_file_size: int = args.max_file_size or cfg.get("max_file_size", 0)
 309 | 
 310 |     try:
 311 |         rows = load_manifest_csv(manifest_path)
 312 |     except ValueError as exc:
 313 |         report = _block_report_for_schema_error(
 314 |             manifest_path, str(exc), max_rows_soft, max_rows_hard, max_file_size
 315 |         )
 316 |         write_json_report(report, Path(args.out))
 317 |         print("Manifest Doctor status: BLOCK")
 318 |         return 2
 319 |     except Exception as exc:
 320 |         print(f"Error reading manifest: {exc}", file=sys.stderr)
 321 |         return 1
 322 | 
 323 |     findings = run_checks(
 324 |         rows, suspicious_dirs, required_paths, required_exts,
 325 |         max_rows_soft, max_rows_hard, max_file_size,
 326 |     )
 327 |     status = determine_status(findings)
 328 |     report = build_report(findings, manifest_path, status, suspicious_dirs)
 329 | 
 330 |     write_json_report(report, Path(args.out))
 331 | 
 332 |     if args.markdown_out:
 333 |         sections = build_markdown_sections(report)
 334 |         write_markdown_report("Manifest Doctor Report", sections, Path(args.markdown_out))
 335 | 
 336 |     print(f"Manifest Doctor status: {status}")
 337 |     return 2 if status == "BLOCK" else 0
